messages.nothingFetched: Nothing was fetched, please update your options.

gettingStarted.note: These settings can be changed later

library.title: Anime Library
library.description: Choose the folder where your anime files are stored. This is where Seanime will scan for your collection.
library.pathHelp: Select the main folder containing your anime collection. You can add more folders later.

player.denshiNotice: Seanime Denshi includes a built-in media player that is enabled by default. You can still configure an external media player.
player.title: Media Player
player.description: Configure your preferred external media player for watching anime and tracking progress automatically.
player.mpvHelp: MPV is recommended for better subtitle rendering, torrent streaming.
player.iinaHelp: Both MPV and IINA are recommended for macOS.
player.mpvInstallNote: On Windows, install MPV easily using Scoop or Chocolatey. On macOS, install MPV using Homebrew.
player.iinaAlert: For IINA to work correctly with Seanime, make sure Quit after all windows are closed is checked and Keep window open after playback finishes is unchecked in your IINA general settings.

torrents.title: Downloading
torrents.description: Configure your torrent client for downloading.
torrents.clientHelp: Client used to download anime torrents

debrid.title: Debrid Service
debrid.description: Debrid services offer faster downloads and instant streaming from the cloud.
debrid.apiKeyHelp: The API key provided by the debrid service.

features.title: Additional Features
features.description: Choose which additional features you'd like to enable. You can enable or disable these later in settings.

items.torrentStreamingDesc: Stream torrents without waiting for download
items.adultContentDesc: Show adult content in library and search
items.richPresenceDesc: Show what you're watching on Discord
items.transcodingDesc: Stream downloaded files on other devices

empty.title: Your home screen is empty
empty.description: Add items to customize your home screen.
empty.addCurrentlyWatching: Add currently watched series to the library
empty.noSeriesWatching: No series are currently being watched
empty.addToList: Add series to your 'Currently watching' list to get started

screen.invalidItem: Item "{schemaName}" cannot be displayed because it is missing some required options.

options.localOnlyDescription: Only anime in your local library will be displayed
options.streamingDescription: All anime in your currently watching list will be included in the library
options.noItemsAdded: No items added yet. Add some items below to customize your home screen.
options.allItemsAdded: All available items have been added to your home screen.

configure.title: Configure {name}
configure.description: Customize the settings for this home item.

continueWatching.name: Continue Watching
continueWatching.description: Display a list of episodes you are currently watching.

continueWatchingHeader.name: Continue Watching Header
continueWatchingHeader.description: Display a header with a carousel of anime you are currently watching.

animeLibrary.name: Anime Library
animeLibrary.description: Display anime you have downloaded or are currently watching by status.

myLists.name: My Lists
myLists.description: Display media from your lists by status.

localAnimeLibrary.name: Local Anime Library
localAnimeLibrary.description: Display a complete grid of anime you have in your local library.

upcomingEpisodes.name: Upcoming Library Episodes
upcomingEpisodes.description: Display a carousel of upcoming episodes from anime you have in your library.

airedRecently.name: Aired Recently (Global)
airedRecently.description: Display a carousel of anime episodes that aired recently.

missedSequels.name: Missed Sequels
missedSequels.description: Display a carousel of sequels that aren't in your collection.

animeScheduleCalendar.name: Anime Schedule Calendar
animeScheduleCalendar.description: Display a calendar of anime episodes based on their airing schedule.

localAnimeLibraryStats.name: Local Anime Library Stats
localAnimeLibraryStats.description: Display the stats for your local anime library.

discoverHeader.name: Discover Header
discoverHeader.description: Display a header with a carousel of anime that are trending.

animeCarousel.name: Anime Carousel
animeCarousel.description: Display a carousel of anime based on the selected options.

mangaCarousel.name: Manga Carousel
mangaCarousel.description: Display a carousel of manga based on the selected options.

mangaLibrary.name: Manga Library
mangaLibrary.description: Display a list of manga you have in your library by status.
